titleStmt.title: SII 15.160: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 160. (B.K. No. 63 of 1928-29.) SANGAM, HUNGUND TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar set up inside the Saṅgamēśvara temple.
This is dated the 14th regnal year of the king, Śrīmukha, Śrāvaṇa ba. 2, Sunday corresponding to 1213 A.D., August 4, f.d.t. °38.

It registers a gift to the god Āchēśvara installed on the bank of the river Malahāri. Another gift consisting of income derived from the sale of betel leaves by the One Thousand is also mentioned. The inscription is damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
yā
davanārāyaṇa
bhujabhaḷacakravartti siṁha
ṇadēvavarṣada 14 neya śrīmu
kha saṁvatsarada śrāvaṇa ba 2 Ādivā
radandu śrīmadācēsvaradēvara hū
dōṭakke dhūpakaṁ dēvarāsi jī
malahāri tīradoḷ tā nelasiddā
cēśvaraṁ mahōtsavadiṁdaṁ tola
gade bhaktarggellaṁ sale kuḍute
sadirkke dīrghamāyuṁ śrī
yamaṁ © paramaguruvenipa
putraṁ cuṁci nādiseṭṭi
dayeyiṁ paramaiśvarya
manittu(ṁ) parirakṣisutirppanakke
saṁgamahēśaṁ ©
© dēvarige sāsirbbaru biṭṭeleyā
yaṁ hēṟiṁge 50 poṟege 25
dēvarigaṟuvatokkalāraṁbhado
kkalalu variṣaṁprati pāgada
lekkadiṁ koṭṭu biṭṭaru © ślōka
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harē
ti vasuṁdharām ṣaṣṭirvvaruṣa
sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jā
yatē krimiḥ ©
śrī caṁdrārkkatāraṁ
baraṁ Āraydu
besakeydu na
ḍasuvaru ©
Digital edition of SII 15.160 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
